title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 25
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to the tennis courts after school? || Girl: I don't think so. All the courts are booked. || Man: We could try the café instead. || Girl: Maybe, but we need to save money. My dad has some extra passes, so [1]we're going to the leisure centre gym this afternoon instead[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the bus station? || Girl: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. || Girl: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are we still going to the tennis courts after school?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. All the courts are booked.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We could try the café instead.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Maybe, but we need to save money. My dad has some extra passes, so we're going to the leisure centre gym this afternoon instead.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the bus station?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a present for my brother.
questions.audio_script: Man: I still need a present for my brother. I thought about buying trainers, but that didn't seem special. || Woman: What about headphones? You mentioned that last week. || Man: I checked, but the shop only had expensive ones. In the end, [1]I bought a board game because we can play together at weekends[/1]. || Woman: That sounds perfect. Useful presents are often better than decorations. || Man: I hope so. I’ll wrap it tonight after dinner, and take it over tomorrow. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.text: I still need a present for my brother. I thought about buying trainers, but that didn't seem special.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds perfect. Useful presents are often better than decorations.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the library.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the library on Saturday? || Man: I was going to take the bus, but the bus drivers are on strike. || Woman: What about the bike? || Man: True, but the roads are busy. Dad suggested a taxi, but [1]I’m going to walk because it is only across the park[/1]. || Woman: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the bike?

dialogue.speaker: man

dialogue.speaker: woman

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a work shift at a cinema.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you working at the cinema this weekend? || Woman: Yes, but not on Friday night as usual. The manager changed the rota because a new manager is training. || Man: So when are you going in? || Woman: I can’t do Saturday morning, and Sunday lunch is already covered, so [1]I’m doing the Saturday evening shift[/1]. || Man: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later. || Woman: Exactly. I can finish my homework then. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but not on Friday night as usual. The manager changed the rota because a new manager is training.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That’s not too bad. You’ll still have some free time later.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. I can finish my homework then.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a summer camp.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What did you do at the summer camp? I thought you were trying canoeing. || Girl: We planned to, but the river was too high. || Boy: Did you try fishing? || Girl: No, because they had no extra rods. In the end, [1]we spent the afternoon doing orienteering[/1]. It was more fun than I expected. || Boy: Maybe I’ll go next time. || Girl: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly. || Girl: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost folder.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your folder yet? I know you were worried about it this morning. || Boy: Not really. I checked the science lab, because I was sure I had it there after our lesson. || Woman: And what about the canteen? You went there afterwards, didn't you? || Boy: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then Mr Green called and said [1]my folder was on the piano in the music room[/1]. I’m going to pick it up before it closes. || Woman: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you found your folder yet? I know you were worried about it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not really. I checked the science lab, because I was sure I had it there after our lesson.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And what about the canteen? You went there afterwards, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then Mr Green called and said my folder was on the piano in the music room. I’m going to pick it up before it closes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a outdoor concert.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the outdoor concert tomorrow? I was going to pack my sun cream, because it looked sunny on the poster. || Man: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is they must sit for a long time. || Woman: Should I take my gloves? || Man: Not really. [1]The teacher said everyone should bring a folding chair[/1], because no extra seats are provided. || Woman: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.
